epoch: int):\\n    if not USE_LR_SCHEDULE:\\n        return None\\n    total_steps = TRAIN_MAX_STEPS if TRAIN_MAX_STEPS is not None else steps_per_epoch * 100\\n    warmup_steps = min(max(steps_per_epoch // 4, 1), max(total_steps // 10, 1))\\n\\n    def lr_lambda(step: int) -> float:\\n        if step < warmup_steps:\\n            return float(step + 1) / float(warmup_steps)\\n        progress = (step - warmup_steps) / float(max(total_steps - warmup_steps, 1))\\n        return 0.1 + 0.9 * 0.5 * (1.0 + np.cos(np.pi * progress))\\n\\n    return optim.lr_scheduler.LambdaLR(optimizer, lr_lambda)\",\"text\":\"\"}],\"primary_mode\":\"summaries\",\"rationale\":\"Use a stronger but still compact CNN, switch to AdamW, and make the LR schedule match the fixed-step budget with warmup + cosine decay.\",\"secondary_modes\":[\"layout\",\"topk\",\"indexing\"]}"}}
